spec_match.rationale: Accurately combines tree-counting functions inside CSS HSL color declarations and animation-delay rules.

interactive.rationale: Includes interactive sliders for CSS variable control, dynamic DOM element insertion/removal, and animation replay.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Accurately details how CSS sibling indices replace static :nth-child declarations and color-preprocessors.

edge_cases.rationale: Outstanding design, delivering a solid JavaScript-calculated fallback for non-supporting browsers to preserve visual parity.

references.rationale: Fails to include the mandatory chromestatus.com/feature/<id> reference link.

design_system.rationale: Uses standard UI layout borders, display tokens, and background grids.

openQuestions.title: Add mandatory chromestatus.com spec reference link
openQuestions.detail: The page is missing the mandatory reference link to the ChromeStatus entry. Please add a reference section containing a link to `https://chromestatus.com/feature/6225478530367488`.

summary: An incredibly well-designed demo that presents dynamic hue ring redistributions and staggered bar delays with an immaculate Javascript-based fallback strategy. Its only flaw is the omission of the mandatory ChromeStatus reference link.
